about.title: Who I am
about.desc1: I’m a Frontend / Fullstack Developer with 5+ years of experience building scalable, high-performance web applications.
about.desc2: Specialized in Angular, React, and modern JavaScript ecosystems, with strong experience in API integration and system architecture.
about.desc3: I enjoy solving real-world problems and building meaningful products that deliver value to users.
about.timeline.2021.title: Started Professional Development
about.timeline.2021.desc: Began working as a frontend developer, focusing on Angular, AngularJS, HTML/CSS, JavaScript, and enterprise UI development.
about.timeline.aratech.title: Aratech — Frontend Developer
about.timeline.aratech.desc: Developed enterprise applications for healthcare and telecom domains, including Hospital LIS systems and Viettel contract management platforms. Worked on complex data workflows, role-based access, responsive UI, and performance optimization.
about.timeline.freelance.title: Freelance Fullstack Developer
about.timeline.freelance.desc: Delivered end-to-end freelance solutions using Angular, Python, React Native, and third-party APIs. Built business automation tools, Meta Ads integrations, AI/LLM-powered workflows, and a Japanese learning mobile application.
about.timeline.techcombank.title: Techcombank — Frontend Developer
about.timeline.techcombank.desc: Built enterprise bidding and contract management systems for internal banking operations. Implemented scalable Angular and NgRx architecture, improved application performance, supported refactoring, and enhanced long-term maintainability through code quality practices.
about.timeline.ratraco.title: RATRACO — AI / Fullstack Developer
about.timeline.ratraco.desc: Applied AI to enterprise logistics operations, including container temperature monitoring, RTSP camera processing, and license plate recognition. Built Angular frontend modules and Node.js backend services, integrating YOLOv8 and Ollama to support automation workflows.
about.timeline.driving.title: Driving School Management System
about.timeline.driving.desc: Designed and built a fullstack production platform for driving school operations. Implemented student management, lesson tracking, internal exams, progress analytics, RBAC, deployment, and production maintenance independently.
about.timeline.smartosc.title: SmartOSC — Cebu Pacific Air
about.timeline.smartosc.desc: Joined an international aviation project for Cebu Pacific Air. Focused on enterprise Angular development, CMS migration, third-party API integration, booking-related workflows, code review, and production-quality feature delivery.
